headline: These Two Nvidia-Backed Companies Are Joining the S&P 500 Later This Month
summary: Nvidia partners Coherent and Lumentum, along with two other companies, are set to join the S&P 500 later this month.

headline: Vertiv Stock Jumps. Why Joining the S&P 500 Trumps the Iran War.
summary: Vertiv, Lumentum, EchoStar, and Coherent are set to join the S&P 500 on March 23, as part of a quarterly rebalancing.

headline: CrowdStrike and 11 Other Stocks That Have Gained Every Day of the Iran War
summary: The conflict in the Middle East has turned the market on its head, with investors piling back into beaten-down software stocks.

headline: Vertiv, Lumentum, Coherent Stocks Rally on S&P 500 Addition
summary: Three companies tied to the artificial-intelligence boom, plus TV and wireless provider EchoStar, are set to become the newest members of the S&P 500. S&P Dow Jones Indices said Friday that EchoStar, digital-infrastructure provider Vertiv and Nvidia-backed Coherent and Lumentum will join the benchmark index.

headline: Switching jobs meant big raises just a few years ago—here’s what the pay bump looks like now
summary: Pay increases for workers who switch jobs are now roughly a third of what they were at the peak of the pandemic hiring boom, a new study shows.

headline: Cloud ETFs Shine Despite Market Selloff: Here's Why
summary: Cloud ETFs are outperforming despite market jitters from Iran tensions, as AI-driven demand and strong earnings from key players lift the sector.

headline: Vertiv, Lumentum, EchoStar Stocks Rally on S&P 500 Addition
summary: Three companies tied to the artificial-intelligence boom, plus TV and wireless provider EchoStar, are set to become the newest members of the S&P 500.  S&P Dow Jones Indices said Friday that EchoStar, digital-infrastructure provider Vertiv and Nvidia-backed Coherent and Lumentum will join the benchmark index.  Vertiv (VRT) shares were up more than 2%.
